prompt: Re-extract tech-requirements.md for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. The existing file has TR-01 through TR-07 with reviewed_at: 2026-04-20. The file is at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md and one of the existing UX-sourced TRs has a source link that no longer resolves.

assertions.text: preserves TR-01 through TR-07 numbering exactly (no renumbering)
flags the broken-source TR (TR-06) with a ⚠️ marker rather than deleting it
appends new requirements at TR-08 or higher (does not reuse numbers)
nulls out reviewed_at (or surfaces that the user must re-set it)
mentions git diff as the review surface for the changes
actually reads the existing tech-requirements.md before re-extracting (rather than rewriting from scratch)
